zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Knyvett於1537年出生在英國維爾爾查爾頓時，他的父親Sir Henry Knyvett27歲，母親Anne Pickering23歲。他於1563年5月13日與Lady Elizabeth Stumpe在英國英格蘭維爾爾拉可可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1598年6月14日在英國英格蘭維爾爾享年61歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾查爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Knyvett于1537年出生在英国維爾爾查爾頓时，他的父亲Sir Henry Knyvett27岁，母亲Anne Pickering23岁。他于1563年5月13日与Lady Elizabeth Stumpe在英国英格兰維爾爾拉可可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1598年6月14日在英国英格兰維爾爾享年61岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾查爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Knyvett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knivett
meanings: English: from a Norman French pronunciation of Knight , resulting from the Norman French difficulty with the h of Old English cniht.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Knyvett was born in 1537, in Charlton, Wiltshire, England, his father, Sir Henry Knyvett, was 27 and his mother, Anne Pickering, was 23. He married Lady Elizabeth Stumpe on 13 May 1563, in Lacock, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 14 June 1598, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Charlton, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Knyvett est né en 1537, à Charlton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Knyvett, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Anne Pickering, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Stumpe le 13 mai 1563, à Lacock, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 14 juin 1598, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Charlton, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Knyvett 1537 in Charlton, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Knyvett 27 und seine Mutter Anne Pickering 23. Er hat am 13. Mai 1563 in Lacock, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Elizabeth Stumpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Juni 1598 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Charlton, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Knyvett è nato il nel 1537 nel Charlton, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry Knyvett, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Anne Pickering, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Stumpe il 13 maggio 1563, nel Lacock, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 14 giugno 1598, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Charlton, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Knyvettが1537年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアチャールトンで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Knyvettは27歳，母Anne Pickeringは23歳であった。1563年5月13日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアラコックでLady Elizabeth Stumpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1598年6月14日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアで61歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアチャールトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Knyvett(이)가 1537년 영국 윌츠히르 찰턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Knyvett(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Pickering(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1563년 5월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 라콕에서 Lady Elizabeth Stumpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1598년 6월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 찰턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Knyvett nasceu em 1537, em Charlton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Knyvett, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Anne Pickering, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Stumpe em 13 de maio de 1563, em Lacock, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de junho de 1598, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Charlton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Knyvett родился в 1537 г. в местности чарлтон, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Knyvett было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Pickering, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Stumpe 13 мая 1563 г. в местности лакокк, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 14 июня 1598 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности чарлтон, уилцхир, Англия.

Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Stumpe el 13 de mayo de 1563, en Lacock, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 14 de junio de 1598, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Charlton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
